parsed.generic_mechanism: The apparent difference is null because complete textual duplication reproduces the same certainty-amplifying belief-reframing mechanism in both blocks.

paraphrased_evidence.A: The reader is generally framed as conditioned rather than blameworthy, and change rests on revised beliefs; however, catastrophic framing, sweeping health certainty, and unsubstantiated clinic and success assertions undermine safety and honesty.
paraphrased_evidence.B: The content and method match A exactly: discipline-based abstinence and overt blame are rejected, while categorical medical claims, alarming consequences, and unsupported testimony are used to validate both diagnosis and remedy.
